overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy futuristic city street in a video game, featuring neon billboards, palm trees, futuristic vehicles, and pedestrians with umbrellas. The scene transitions from a commercial billboard area past automated street sweepers to an underpass beneath an elevated highway.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rainy futuristic city sidewalk with the 'WET DREAM' billboard visible on the left. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk toward the camera while palm trees line the street center. The wet concrete reflects the neon lights from surrounding buildings.

segments.scene_description: Moving beneath the massive elevated highway structure that dominates the sky. The lighting becomes dimmer and more artificial. The sidewalk curves through the underpass area with moderate pedestrian traffic, including people with umbrellas and futuristic rain gear, while vehicles continue to pass on the road to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked futuristic city that transitions from a bright, neon-lit commercial district into the shadowed depths of an urban underpass. It begins on a wet sidewalk beneath the glow of a WET DREAM billboard, moving past pedestrians with umbrellas and palm trees that reflect vibrant neon lights on the concrete. As the camera progresses along a wide arterial road, the view expands to include flowing traffic of futuristic vehicles and the distant silhouette of an elevated highway ramp. The scene then shifts toward the NC CLUB entrance, gliding past automated street sweepers and planters as the sidewalk curves away from the open street. Finally, the camera moves beneath the massive concrete structure of the highway, where the lighting dims and the environment becomes more enclosed and artificial while pedestrians in futuristic rain gear navigate the sheltered underpass.
